lore:quest.name: Hold the Line
lore:quest.description: Brenna will not forge for a cause that cannot win. Prove the Corrupted can bleed: slay 10 Corrupted Raiders in the hills around Elderfall, and the first blade off her rekindled anvil is yours.
steps: Accept the quest from Brenna Ironsong after relighting her forge.
Slay 10 Corrupted Raiders (raid waves and ambushes count).
The quest completes automatically on the tenth kill.
